name: cortex-ai-workspace
description: Cortex AI - AI Agent Orchestration and Chat Platform Root Workspace

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix backend/services/agent && npm install --prefix backend/services/auth && npm install --prefix backend/services/billing && npm install --prefix backend/services/chat
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:chat" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:billing" "npm run dev:frontend"
